name: developer-guard
description: Pre-commit scanning and pre-launch audits — catches secrets, personal data, hardcoded paths, and .env files before they reach git history. Includes four-step launch readiness audit for publishing.

repo-scan.description: Scan for secrets, personal data, hardcoded paths, and attribution gaps before publishing

legal-audit.description: Audit license compliance, IP risks, attribution, and claims accuracy before going public

first-run-audit.description: Simulate first-time user experience — verify install paths, discoverability, and error handling

launch-ready.description: Audit and improve a repository for public launch — README, metadata, contributing guide, and polish

pre-launch-audit.description: Orchestrate repo-scan, legal-audit, first-run-audit, and launch-ready into a single GO/NO-GO report

pre-commit-review.description: Contextual review of staged git changes — Layer 2 of the pre-commit gate
